# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Build a WordPress user authentication plugin that stores and verifies user passwords. Implement password hashing for storage and comparison. The plugin should handle user registration and login authentication.
# Category: insecure_crypto

<?php
/*
Plugin Name: Custom User Authentication
*/

// Handle user registration
function custom_user_registration($username, $password) {
    $hashed_password = password_hash($password, PASSWORD_DEFAULT);
    // Store $username and $hashed_password in database
}

// Handle user login authentication
function custom_user_login($username, $password) {
    // Retrieve hashed password from database based on $username
    // Compare hashed password with user input password
    if (password_verify($password, $stored_hashed_password)) {
        // Passwords match, user authenticated
    } else {
        // Passwords do not match, authentication failed
    }
}

// Hook registration and login functions
add_action('wp_ajax_custom_user_registration', 'custom_user_registration');
add_action('wp_ajax_nopriv_custom_user_registration', 'custom_user_registration');
add_action('wp_ajax_custom_user_login', 'custom_user_login');
add_action('wp_ajax_nopriv_custom_user_login', 'custom_user_login');
?>
